title: The Lovable Chest
description: This mod adds Chester, along with the often forgot about Hutch, from the game Don't Starve Together to your Minecraft world! They act as portable chests to store your items! A backpack that follows you!
body:
Supports: [1.20.1] [1.19.2] [1.19.4] [1.18.2]
Mod Platform: [Forge]

**Yes, it requires [Geckolib](https://modrinth.com/mod/geckolib)**

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/g0g_cvczOok" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

This mod adds [Chester](https://dontstarve.wiki.gg/wiki/Chester), along with the often forgot about [Hutch](https://dontstarve.wiki.gg/wiki/Hutch), from the game Don't Starve Together to your Minecraft world! They act as portable chests to store your items! A backpack that follows you!

**You can only have one Chester or Hutch active at a time!**

Use the respective items on the ground to spawn them, and punch them holding their items to despawn them!

Chester and Hutch have passive regeneration, and 50HP (25 hearts). Should they die, they will drop all of their items.

They will not follow you if you do not have their item, so be careful if you lose them! (New items can be crafted to control already spawned Chester or Hutch) 

[Wiki](https://sites.google.com/view/maussite/my-projects/mod-wikis/the-lovable-chest)       [YouTube](https://www.youtube.com/@HejImMaus/featured)       [My Website](https://sites.google.com/view/maussite/home)       [KoFi (Donate)](https://ko-fi.com/hejimmaus)

![Chester's Eye Bone crafting recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/10beb033b81501792c35795dc43ca18ff80d2af6.png)
_→ In versions below 1.19 the Goat Horns are replaced with Quartz_

![Hutch's Star-Sky crafting recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d974c23e18c8facf8d429bbf2f707aa864cdcd37.png)

![Chester inventory preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8e7cd5f6da8760ca7b5b10830e24bfd53cebd5a0_0.webp)

**Issues & Bugs**

I have tested this with about 300 other mods installed, with no issues! However:

If you find any issues with the mod, please tell me and I will try to fix them the best I can.

For any major incompatibilities please report them to me first, and not whatever you think is causing the issue. Please provide log files with issues. 

If I am unable to resolve an issue on my end, please contact the authors of the conflicting mod. They may be able to help.

**Usage Policy**

Yes, you may use this mod in any modpacks you may make, however, such modpacks must be created and implemented on Modrinth.

Any redistribution of this mod or its assets anywhere outside of the Modrinth website, along with any redistribution of the mod or its assets without consent from me (HejImMaus), will not be tolerated. You did not make the mod, so do not take credit for it.

That being said, the assets of this mod may be included in any resource pack involving them. If this is the case, please link the Modrinth page of this mod somewhere on the page which contains your resource pack.
